summary: Phase 33 - Verified insert_notification helper refactoring in admin.py. All admin approval/rejection APIs working correctly. Fixed 1 pre-existing return type annotation bug.
critical_code_review_comments: insert_notification helper function correctly defined at line 25 in admin.py
20 usages of insert_notification helper for standard user notifications
4 remaining db.notifications.insert_one usages are intentional (different data structures: commission updates with old_rate/new_rate, admin-created notifications with target/created_by)
Fixed 1 pre-existing return type annotation bug: get_admin_notifications (-> dict changed to -> list)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 33 refactoring verified: insert_notification helper function extracted and used 20 times for standard user notifications. 4 remaining db.notifications.insert_one usages are intentional for different notification structures (commission updates, admin-created notifications). Fixed 1 return type annotation bug (get_admin_notifications -> list). All admin APIs tested: sellers pending/all/approve/reject/suspend/activate, drivers pending/all/approve/reject, products pending/all/approve/reject, food-products pending/approve/reject, stats, settings, platform-status, notifications.

insert_notification_helper.implementation: Creates notification with id, user_id, title, message, type, is_read, created_at, optional data

remaining_direct_inserts.reason: Different notification structures - commission updates (with old_rate/new_rate data), admin-created notifications (with target/created_by fields)

details: get_admin_notifications: return type -> dict changed to -> list
